title: OneBagToRuleThemAll
description: OneBagToRuleThemAll makes all players share one global inventory—any item picked up, crafted, or moved is instantly synced across everyone. It’s perfect for chaotic cooperation or extreme teamwork challenges.
body: OneBagToRuleThemAll is a Bukkit plugin that forces all players to share a single, synchronized inventory. Every action—crafting, picking up, moving, or dropping items—instantly affects everyone else. It’s the ultimate test of teamwork, trust, or total chaos in your server.
